title: Redirect healthcheck alerts to inject endpoint

log.context: Redirect healthcheck alerts to inject endpoint

Done. Here's what changed:

**File:** `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/healthcheck_act.py`

The `send_alert` activity previously called the Discord bot API directly (`POST {DISCORD_API}/channels/{MAIN_CHANNEL_ID}/messages` with a bot token). It now POSTs to `http://127.0.0.1:8085/webhooks/bigclungus-main` with `{"content": message, "user": "healthcheck"}`, routing alerts through the omni inject endpoint so they arrive as injected messages to BigClungus rather than as direct public Discor...(truncated)
